name: Vakrangee Limited
summary: Vakrangee Limited, a technology company, provides banking, ATM, insurance, financial services, e-governance, e-commerce, and logistics services in India. The company offers bank account opening, cash deposits, withdrawals, money transfer, fixed and recurring deposits, balance enquiry, statement of accounts, money disbursement, consumer loans, housing loans, SME and working capital loans, and domestic money transfer services; and life insurance, motor insurance, health insurance, and social security and micro insurance schemes. It also operates assisted online shopping and healthcare, assisted travel services, and telecom and bill payments services platforms, as well as offers courier and logistics services. The company operates approximately 10,000 Vakrangee Kendra outlets. The company was formerly known as Vakrangee Softwares Limited and changed its name to Vakrangee Limited in October 2013. Vakrangee Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Mumbai, India.
